reviews.review_text:
We had a great experience staying here. The staff incredibly accommodating, helpful, and genuinely understanding throughout our stay. They went above and beyond by making space for us to work on my 4WD, which was a huge help as I needed to change sump of my engine. That I had cracked 4 wheel driving in the area.

A special mention to Anthony—he was super friendly, approachable, and always willing to lend a hand. Nothing was too much trouble.

On top of that, the pricing was very affordable. Highly recommend this place if you’re looking for somewhere welcoming, supportive, and great value for money. Would definitely stay again!
Great

We’ve been staying at Erica Caravan Park for quite a while now and have truly experienced the amazing customer service from the owners, Anthony and Janine 😊 They are always friendly, welcoming, and happy to help with anything — from local tips to helping us more than once with car issues, always with a smile!

The park itself is beautiful, peaceful, and surrounded by nature 🌲 Everything is very clean and well maintained, and the facilities include a large shared kitchen (with a pizza oven!), BBQ area, fridge and freezer, laundry, and even a cozy bar with a firepit 🍻 There are also recreational areas like a basketball court and table tennis 🏓

We’ve felt very comfortable here and would happily recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing and friendly place to stay :)

Our stay at Erica Caravan Park has been wonderful. Anthony and Janine create such a friendly and welcoming atmosphere and are always ready to help, whether it’s sharing local recommendations or lending a hand when we had a few car issues during our stay.

The park is set in a really peaceful natural environment and is kept very clean and tidy. Guests have access to great facilities including a large kitchen, BBQ area, fridge, freezer, laundry, a small bar, and some recreational spaces like a basketball court and table tennis.

It’s a relaxing place with a genuine, caring vibe, and we’d gladly suggest it to anyone visiting the area.
A place to hang

Stayed for 3 nights in the caravan.
Staff are friendly and helpful.  Amenities not super modern but clean and tidy - water nice and warm.  Easy walk to the pub, or general store.
Good location for exploring Walhalla, Thompson dam, and Baw Baw.
Will stay again when next up that way.

Very relaxing and dog friendly caravan park.
The view behind the caravan park is beautiful with cattles grazing in the vast green field during the day. The property is fenced.
The caravan park is not crowded, safe and amenities are very well maintained. Tap water is clean. Good site for camping with shower available. We spent 2 nights on the powered site. It was an enjoyable stay and I'd highly recommend the place.

We spent five nights on a powered site and other family members rented one of the cabins.||Overall the park is fantastic. ||Anthony and Janine were great hosts and have clearly invested in making it a great place to stay.||Everything is clean and manicured.||The park is close to everything from the pub, a local store, a trip to Walhalla or the Thomson dam. ||We will definitely be back and highly recommend this park.

We spent five nights on a powered site and other family members rented one of the cabins.

Overall the park is fantastic.

Anthony and Janine were great hosts and have clearly invested in making it a great place to stay.

Everything is clean and manicured.

The park is close to everything from the pub, a local store, a trip to Walhalla or the Thomson dam.

We will definitely be back and highly recommend this park.

Many thanks Anthony and Janine for a great stay. Thoroughly enjoyable and a great night Friday. Park facilities are fantastic, very clean and well maintained. Will definitely come back to stay again. The photo of Jessie is a big hit with our grandkids.
All the very best Ian & Heather

We finished a 180km hike on the AAWT at the Mount Erica Car Park. There were no suitable camp sites there so we called Erica Caravan Park and booked the family unit. Anthony picked us up and took us to the Caravan Park.|We thought we had “died and gone to heaven”. An absolutely beautiful spot.|Laundry done, showered, and in clean clothes. The best way to finish up. Highly recommended.
Great little Caravan Park with cabins.   Is pet friendly and the atea is amazing to drive around.   The managers are very friendly
Brilliant service and friendly staff, ideal location and great hospitality, highly recommend, stay there alot
Such a great little park

Great Caravan Park host were fabulous friendly and very welcoming.. clean amenities and well maintained grounds ...walking distance to the Local and even had a bar open in the evenings to meet others....definitely give these guys a go ...
Lovely place.
Anthony and Janine were friendly and very accomodating. Enjoyed our time there again! The park is well maintained and clean. Will be back 👍
Two bedroom cabin was clean and perfect for a family of 4 - separate rooms. Close to Baw Baw
Excellent location for base to explore near by places with 4WD. Great host with excellent upkeep of the place.

Stayed at the caravan park for Kings B'day weekend.  The whole family camped, and the owners Anthony and Janine were wonderful hosts.  Undercover fire pits, caravan park pub was awesome with complimentary fire pit. Footy on big screen, karaoke as well as music. Great spot for 4WDriving motorbiking and BMX tracks.
Erica Hotel across the road was ideal. Very friendly hosts and live music on Sunday Arvo. We will be back! Delia and Mark.

This is one of the best caravan parks I’ve been too.  They were so accomodating owners came around talking with everyone had a licenced bar open for the footy  , karaoke etc , lots of ammenities if you were to forget stuff , lots of games for the children to play etc. thanks guys

Werribee 4x4 club.

Just spent the weekend with a group of friends at the Erica Caravan park.
We stayed in the cabins, everything we needed was there, it was comfortable and well maintained and presented.
Anthony & Janine were great hosts,  and at night we were able to enjoy the small bar facility next to an open fire, screens to watch and music played.
I highly recommend you try the Erica Caravan Park and services.

Our second caravan trip to Erica.  Vans cannot be taken to Walhalla so Erica is one of the closest towns.
Lovely owners and great facilities.  We were so disappointed to find the pub was closed Sunday and Monday as they do fantastic meals.  Keep in mind to have enough provisions as nearest town quite a drive away.

Clean and spacious cabin with a comfortable bed at a very affordable price. The staff were friendly and while there were a few guests staying for the weekend, the park was very quiet with no one making a racket after dark. Would stay again.
Great caravan park with a wonderful outlook and friendly owners. Our week was very relaxing and look forward to visiting again.
Great little Caravan park!  Beautiful outlook over the fields and a quite little town with the pub across the road.
Has very good service. The only thins is that there is no cupboards to keep your things.

Anthony and Janine are very helpful and friendly. Had a great night with them at their bar which was very cozy with the fire pit and lighting. The surroundings around the caravan park are country with a handy pub across the road with great meals. The amenities at the park are kept very clean and the grounds tidy. The communal areas are well equipped and are used by many. The caravan park is small, so don't expect a swimming pool or jumping pillow, just book in to relax for a few days and visit the areas nearby. Stuart and Jennie.

Recently spent the weekend here with a number of friends from our car club.|Owner's friendly and welcoming.|Whilst some friends had van sites we were in a cabin, which I understand  have recently been refurbished - lovely inside. Well equipped, clean and bed quite comfortable.|The surrounding areas of both the cabins and sites were well maintained. The outside eating area was also well maintained and having been lucky enough for such a lovely weekend weather wise we had a couple of BBQ's.|Would definitely recommend.
Great place amazing and super friendly owners ,clean and tidy
Lovely little caravan park in a quiet small town. Amenities were clean, sites good size with lush grass. Guests all respected each other. Would definitely come back here to stay.

Just want to say a huge thanks to Anthony and Janine for your hospitality and making our stay with you such a great couple of days.
Amenities are lovely and clean, huge sites and loved the Bar to watch the footie with you.
Max and Murphy loved there stay as well.

Recently stayed at Erica Caravan Park and had a wonderful experience. The hosts, Janine and Anthony, were incredibly friendly and accommodating, making us feel very welcome. The park offers nice grassy sites, great BBQ facilities, and clean amenities, which made for a comfortable stay. It’s a lovely little spot to unwind after exploring the area. I highly recommend booking your stay here, you won’t be disappointed!

Conveniently the pub (open Wed-Sun) is near by offering a variety of pub favourites if you don't feel like cooking.

Really nice small park that reflects the beauty of the area. Lovely to wake up and hear the birds and look at the cows across the fence. Nice drive through to the historical town of Walhalla.
The hosts Anthony and Janine are very welcoming and happy to help however they can, and are good to catch up with in the on-site bar with its great firepit and Karaoke. Highly recommend.
Thanks guys we really enjoyed our stay and will be back.

Great  little park, the owners are lovely, bathrooms clean as a whistle, grounds perfect..Tthe only downfall was, the camp kitchenire/games areas were very grubby.|Egg shells and rubbish, the kitchen items were all dirty.|Lucky  i brought my own.
It's a great little caravan park, with friendly owner operators.

You couldn't ask for a better caravan park! The toilet & bathroom facilities were so clean. The camp kitchen was so clean and well equipped. There was a kids playroom with TV and games and another undercover sitting area around an open fire. The highlight was a welcoming bar in the evening with an open fire. We felt so welcomed by the lovely owners. We will be back!
Cabins are small, and have been well used. But clean, functional, and fantastic value.

Stayed there last week and had a wonderful time.
The kids and I enjoyed our stay, although I would advise adults not to sleep in the bunk bed unless you can help it.

We have been to this park a number of times and kept returning due to the previous owners.  New owners took over last year just before our visit on Australia day 2024 and we noticed the change immediately.  We decided to give the park another go so returned for Australia day 2025 but we won't be back.  Female toilets were not well serviced, one had no paper for two days another had none for one day.  Out of three soap dispensers one was empty from the time we arrived and another ran out on the second day.  I'm not sure if the owner bothered to check supplies while cleaning.
It felt like more sites had been squeezed in because we all felt squashed with hardly enough room for car parking.  It is a small park and we used to love the friendly atmosphere but sadly that has gone.

Erica Caravan Park is a truly beautiful camp ground.
Surrounded by rich farm land and Mountain Ash forestry, the park is perfectly located for those who love to just relax or tackle the rail trail on foot or by bike.
Erica Caravan Park is meticulously maintained by the owners, who are both welcoming and engaging.
The amenities are spotlessly clean, with showers that are hot and instant.
This Park has plenty for the kids to do and a bar area for adults, be it BYO or purchased.
Directly across the road is the Erica Pub.
Saturday and Sunday is busy with locals, many who have spent the day on trail bikes, and the pub grub is both generous and delicious. The bistro is worth a visit just for the impressive chain saw display, honouring the timber history of the area.
Highly recommend Erica Caravan Park.
Owners are friendly and welcoming,  sites are great. Awesome for families. Great area for the kids, and a bar for the adults.

We had a wonderful stay at Erica Caravan Park, located in the quaint township of Erica, known for its timber industry and small-town charm. Its proximity to Walhalla, a beautifully preserved gold rush town with attractions like the gold mine railway, makes it an excellent base for exploring this fascinating region. Walhalla offers much more than its railway, with plenty of history and scenery to discover.

The campground itself is well-equipped, featuring clean showers, toilets, fire pits, a kitchen, and laundry facilities—all impeccably maintained. The camping areas are well-marked, spacious, and peaceful, ensuring a comfortable and quiet stay.

For adventure seekers, there’s no shortage of activities, especially for those with a 4WD or motocross bikes. We particularly enjoyed the 25 km dirt road from Walhalla to the Thomson Dam Wall—an awesome experience. There are plenty of tracks to suit all levels of intensity. Visiting in summer was fantastic, but it sounds like winter offers even more unique fun.

A special mention to Anthony, the host, who was incredibly kind and responsive, ensuring the campground is kept in top-notch condition. And if you’re not in the mood to cook, the Erica Hotel Motel across the road serves delicious meals—you won’t regret stopping by.

I enjoyed my time here very much! The staff would help you out when asked and it had all the basic facilities. The bathrooms were clean and always had toilet paper in it and the price was pretty good. They have a bar with a small selection of drinks but an amazing vibe a very friendly people. It’s a great place for families and kids and if you’re willing to drive a bit there’s some great activities and places around. The site was flat, had water, a microwave, fridge, power and picnic tables plus a washing machine.
This place is heaven of Victoria, super clean place with friendly staff and special the little bar is vibe, the people of Erica are amazing.

Perfect little caravan park. Although amenities were dated, they were absolutely spotless. Nice big grassy sites, atleast 3 communal areas with new BBQs and firepits all neat and tidy. Basketball hoop, Large chess board and totem tennis within the park and cricket pitch and great little playground conveniently just out the front. We would definately stay here again.

Stayed the weekend at Erica Caravan Park to attend 4x4 driving course in Rawson. Great location, service excellent, swapped to a powered site no probs, hassle free. Amenities dated but clean & functional! On premises bar, and great pub meals opposite at Erica Hotel. Sites not the largest but were sufficient. Best choice of caravan parks in the area by far. Will be back. Craig & Naomi

Great little park. Staff friendly, facilities are not new BUT are kept clean and fresh. Showers are hot and don't take forever to come through. Two bbq's in the main camp kitchen + a large gas cook top. Nice open fireplace place for the winter months. Pub with great priced counter meals across the road in easy walking distance and cafe just up the road, again easy walk. Great spot to stop for a couple of days and explore the local area.

Wow.. what a hidden gem! Beautiful flat grass sites, clean amenities and plenty to do. The owners Anthony and Janine went out of their way to help out and made us feel like family. Definitely one of the best parks we have stayed at. Such a great vibe. We will definitely be back.

A great park, with very helpful friendly owners, and great amenities.  It has a Pub just across the road,  and a fantastic Cafe a very short walk away. General store just up the road - and Beautiful Walhalla not foe away - great little getaway. 😍

Loved this small little camping ground tucked away at the foothills of Baw Baw NP. Well run camp, with clean facilities, nice managers. Excellent spot to explore the region esp hiking and biking. I’ll be back again!

If you have the option to spend a night here when the rat race is distant, you will enjoy a beer around the communal fire with the lovely couple that manage this place. 10/10
Great introduction to the snow in 2024
Will be back for years to come 💥

We had our very first experience in our caravan this weekend. So glad we choose to stay at Erica Caravan Park.
Anthony and Janine are absolutely lovely, so accommodating and helpful. The park is beautiful, large sites and clean amenities. 'The Bar' is a great retreat to meet other campers and watch the footy. Heaps of space for riding bikes, the kids room has heaps of family friendly games. Just a short 35min drive to the snow.
We had an amazing stay and can't wait to come back. Thanks heaps for helping make our first experience in our van such a good one.
Stay a couple of nights,  had a great time,  made the most of the big screen watching the footy. Wonderful hosts, very friendly and helpful.
Very tidy.

This is one of the best caravan parks I have ever stayed at. The owners are very very nice people. I loved the fluffy blankets in the rooms. I have no faults for this caravan park whatsoever. Our family also loved "the hub" which is a fun little games room. I highly recommend staying here.
Great quiet spot. Thanks Anthony and Janine for your customer care. Await to see all your improvements on our next visit. Worth the stop.
Good size sites, clean toilets, good community areas and kitchens. Walk to pub.

Very neat caravan park with ample undercover and outdoor communal fire pits which made for a very easy and comfortable 'sunny one minute, rainy the next' June long weekend.

Well equiped and maintained camp kitchen and communal bathrooms and laundry facilities.
Cracking couple of nights on unpowered site. Great facilities and owner Anth treated us to fire and footy on big screen. Looking forward to coming back
The caravan park is okay. It is expensive for what is on offer but options are very limited.
A lovely little park. Amenities were very clean and tidy. Lovely outlook and very quiet
Really great spot. Friendly staff. The amenities were clean and really family friendly.
Family friendly and clean. Great little caravan park. Worth the visit. Lots for the kids to do. So close to the rich local history.

Absolutely loved my stay,beautiful surroundings, clean comfortable cabin and lovely bbq and bar facilities. The owners are wonderful and the whole park has a lovely feel to it.I will be going back.I was able to book on short notice and only wish I could have stayed longer.
Absolutely loved it.Clean,wonderful hosts and fantastic bbq facilities. There is a drinks area with a wonderful view and the park is dog friendly. A credit to the hard working owners.

A great place to stay
We stayed in a 2 bedroom air-conditioned self contained cabin with an outside deck which was clean and comfortable with everything we needed. Nice hot shower too. The park is clean, tidy and well kept and also includes a games room, BBQ area, wash house and extra shower block/toilets etc if needed. There is a pub, cafe, shop and adjoining oval very close by. Thanks to Anthony and Janine for being great hosts.
Looking forward to returning again

This is a well kept park with good facilities. We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin which was clean and well presented, although the living area could be tight if all 5 beds where being used. It has a nice deck with a table and 2 seats which does get the afternoon sun and as most cabins face the same direction they would suffer the same issue. Not bad in cooler weather. Overall a good clean park but the cabins are a little small compared to some.

Stayed for 3 nights on a powered site. It was beautiful. The grounds were immaculate, the amenities were clean (and cleaned regularly). The owners could not be more helpful, friendly or accommodating. We were testing a new tent setup and they gave us plenty of time on the day of departure to get sorted and vacate the site. The icing on the cake was the camp bar and wood fire. It was a great place to meet in the evening and enjoy a drink (yes it's licenced). Could not recommend it more if you're visiting the area, a great place to stay.

My husband and myself were very happy with our stay at the Erica Caravan Park,
Anthony was a very good host, the caravan park was very clean, tidy and quiet, all the amenities were good and clean, the caravan park has been well maintained. The sites were good sizes so plenty of room for the caravan, car and our setup.
The nightly bar was good, good prices, it was nice to meet the owners of the caravan park and some of the other campers, it was a very relaxing and comfortable atmosphere at the caravan park, we will definitely be returning to the Erica Caravan Park with our kids next time as we are new to caravanning and it is a very family friendly caravan park, in a very quiet town away from all the rush of the city.
Wonderful place. Great hosts setting out on their new adventure. Wouldn’t hesitate to set up base here to explore the amazing surroundings which MUST include Walhalla!

Janine and Anthony the new owners of Erica CP will go out of their way to ensure you have a great stay. Enjoy the peace and green lawns, the proximity to Walhalla and the Park Bar of an evening. 3 nights was just enough time for us to di everything we planned. This is the best park in the area :)

Bec, Trev and Scooby have been amazing hosts for all the school holidays and long weekends over the past 4 years we've been visiting.
We've brought our own van with plenty of room for the annexe, also staying numerous times in the cabins with the family, or a sneaky couple weekend away.
The park has transformed over the years, with plenty of activities for the kids in "The Hub", basketball, outdoor chess and heaps of room on the adjoining oval. The park is always tidy and overall clean, with Bec and Trev always keeping on top of all the amenities ensuring our long or short stay needs are met with everything we could need.
"The Bar", how good is happy hour and often BBQs for the campers! Never run out of a drink being a licenced premises also, sitting by one of the fires with the tunes going, even top the night of with a pizza in the pizza oven.
Hats off to Bec and Trev for turning this amazing park into what it is, allowing us to have great holidays four wheel driving, fishing or sightseeing with our family, friends and other returning fellow campers.
Absolute Legends!

Best ever place to stay In we stayed here an felt like home we didn’t want to leave .The bar the showers toilets hospitality the cake on grand final day (go the pies)  the doggo (Scooby doo) was the best we will be back as a definite Thanku again bec an Trev real troopers loved it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This is a great caravan park with fantastic hosts. The park is clean, well run & has lovely views. Bec & Trev are very friendly & helpful. The cabin was spotless and had everything we needed. Unfortunately we made a quick decision to leave early due to a fire in the area & a message from the CFA to prepare to evacuate. We didn't get a chance to thank Bec & Trev for their hospitality so I hope they read this. Thanks guys! You were great!
Bec and trev the owners make the place they are amazing people and scooby Doo their dog is a legend
Nice relaxed place. Very nice owners. Dog friendly.
Great little park. Bec and Trev are fantastic hosts.

What a great little caravan park with great facilities.
Im we have stayed in a number of parks over the years and I have never been welcomed to a park with such enthusiasm. The owners are unbelievably happy to have you there. Even went as far as sharing herbs out of their own kitchen with us.
Will be back for sure. Thank you.

Our second stay here & I can't speak highly enough of the park & our hosts. Bec & Trev go above & beyond to help out during our stay.  The closest you'll get to Mt Baw Baw without staying on the mountain, its such good value & the area is very pretty.
The cabins are comfy, the pizza oven in the camp kitchen is tip top & there's a massive selection of DVD's to while away the evening.
Highly recommend!
